---
title: "Professional Summary"
title-block: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-copy: true
---

<style>
.resume-link {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.resume-frame {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1000px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
}
</style>

<a
  href="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf"
  class="resume-link"
  target="_blank"
  download>
  Download Resume (PDF)
</a>

<iframe
  src="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf#page=1&navpanes=0&toolbar=0&scrollbar=0"
  class="resume-frame">
</iframe>

---

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: italic; margin-top: 40px;">
  <strong>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
    <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">bdegouw@bu.edu</a>
  </strong>
</div>
